debug_info.goal:

Ω : Type u_2

inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace Ω

a b : α
hab : a ≠ b
⊢ IndepFun (fun ω s => rewardByCount A R a s ω) (fun ω s => rewardByCount A R b s ω) (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν))

failed_attempts:

    rw [Measure.iIndepFun_infinitePi_iff]
    intro n
    rw [Measure.iIndepFun_infinitePi_iff]
    intro a
    exact iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure'' ν a
  let g (x : α) (ω : ℕ → α → ℝ) (n : ℕ) : ℝ := ω n x
  exact iIndepFun.indepFun_comp_disjoint this (by simp [hab]; exact hab) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
